channel.title: Caseback Chronicle
channel.description: Fresh takes for vintage watch collectors on a budget.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of servicing
item.description: The most common early stumbles in servicing, and the cheap corrections that fix them for vintage watch collectors on a budget.

item.title: "vintage watch buying guide" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about vintage watch buying guide through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your history questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the history questions vintage watch collectors on a budget keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in straps with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest straps adjustments that vintage watch collectors on a budget report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: vintage watch buying guide
item.description: The persistent myths around vintage watch buying guide, stress-tested against what vintage watch collectors on a budget actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your buying in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying buying project for vintage watch collectors on a budget — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/WatchExchange is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the history community this week.

item.title: The straps checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified straps purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of servicing
item.description: The most common early stumbles in servicing, and the cheap corrections that fix them for vintage watch collectors on a budget.
